reviews.comment:
Una YPF FULL como todas las de la ruta. Muy bien puesta y con instalaciones limpias. La atención en la cafeteria es PÉSIMA, los empleados con muy mal carácter. Nada recomendable entrar a tomar algo cuando hay mucha gente

(Translated by Google)
A full-service YPF station, just like all the others on the highway. Very well-maintained and with clean facilities. The service in the cafeteria is TERRIBLE; the employees are very rude. I wouldn't recommend going in for a drink when it's crowded.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNKeDRmaDRnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Se puede mejorar la comida casera. Después todo bien, variedad en el shop, buenos baños y limpios. Agua caliente gratis. Buena atención

(Translated by Google)
The home-cooked food could be improved. Otherwise, everything was fine: good selection in the shop, clean and nice restrooms, free hot water, and good service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNKaF9pWEN3EAE

reviews.comment:
Esta estación es para parar. Limpia, para descansar un rato todo muy lindo. Baños impecables. Con agua para mate sin costo.

(Translated by Google)
This station is a great stop. It's clean, perfect for resting for a while, and everything is very nice. The bathrooms are spotless, and there's free water for mate.
